emails.subject: Letter of Intent with S&P
emails.body: ----- Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 04/10/2001 09:10 AM Mark Greenberg@ENRON 04/09/2001 07:43 PM

emails.subject: Letter of Intent with S&P
emails.body: ----- Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 04/10/2001 09:10 AM Mark Greenberg@ENRON 04/09/2001 07:43 PM

emails.subject: Re: Letter of Intent with S&P
emails.body: Re: Letter of Intent with S&P To the best of my knowledge none of the ENA affiliates that I receive agreements from has any agreement with Standard Poor's. These entities have several agreements with Citibank, but each is transaction specific and with one exception (an agreement with Enron Europe Limited relating to a power project in Turkey) protect only Enron information. I'm sure you are aware of the agreement that EnronCredit.com has with Credit2B.com. Kay Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 04/10/2001 09:10 AM
